## 📋 Pull Request

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure/Build improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvements
- [ ] 🛡️ Security fix

### 📝 Description
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->

### 🔄 Related Issues
<!-- Link to any related issues -->
- Closes #
- Fixes #
- Related to #

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation as necessary
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have tested this on:
  - [ ] Ubuntu/Linux
  - [ ] macOS
  - [ ] Windows
  - [ ] Docker

### ✅ Checklist
<!-- Put an 'x' in all the boxes that apply -->

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

**Testing:**
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have tested edge cases and error conditions

**Rust-specific:**
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo audit` shows no vulnerabilities

**Python-specific:**
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Dependencies are updated in `pyproject.toml` if needed

**Docker/Infrastructure:**
- [ ] Docker images build successfully
- [ ] `docker-compose` configuration is valid
- [ ] Environment variables are documented in `.env.example`

### 📚 Documentation
<!-- If this is a user-facing change, please document it -->
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] User guide updated
- [ ] Changelog updated

### 🚀 Deployment
<!-- Any deployment considerations -->
- [ ] Database migration required
- [ ] Environment variables required
- [ ] External dependencies required
- [ ] Configuration changes required

### 🔍 Review Focus Areas
<!-- What should reviewers focus on -->
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] Breaking changes
- [ ] Documentation accuracy
- [ ] Test coverage

### 📊 Screenshots/Videos
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or videos to demonstrate your changes -->

### 📖 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context or information about this PR -->

### 🔗 Dependencies
<!-- List any new dependencies added -->
- Rust crates:
- Python packages:
- System packages:
- Docker images:

---

## 🤖 Automated Checks

This PR will automatically run the following checks:
- Rust formatting, linting, and testing
- Python formatting, linting, and testing
- Docker build validation
- Security audits

## 📋 Merge Requirements

Before this PR can be merged:
1. All automated checks must pass
2. At least one maintainer approval
3. No merge conflicts
4. Documentation updated (if applicable)
5. Tests added/updated (if applicable)

---

**Thank you for contributing to the Indonesia Cybersecurity Incident Index! 🇮🇩**
